codeReview.summary: Small, focused bug fix in the chain selector change handler (static/js/app.js). The old code wrapped From/To token updates inside `if (!customPairs[chain])`, meaning tokens were only updated when no custom override existed for the target chain. When a custom override DID exist, the tokens were left showing the previous chain's addresses — a clear bug. The fix removes the conditional guard so `getEffectivePair(chain)` is always called, which correctly returns the custom pair if saved or the factory default otherwise. The suppressModal/wasUserEdited reset logic was also correctly moved outside the conditional, since programmatic token updates should always suppress the unknown-token modal. The `getEffectivePair` function has a safe fallback (`{ from: '', to: '' }`) for unknown chains. All 6 cross-area assertions (VAL-CROSS-001, -004, -005, -006, -008, -010) were verified via browser automation with documented evidence. All CI validators passed (298 tests, ruff, mypy).

issues.description: Validation screenshot committed to repo root. This follows the existing convention (many val-*.png files already exist), but these screenshots add binary bloat to git history. Consider adding them to .gitignore or a dedicated evidence directory outside the repo.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The chain change handler and setDefaultPair() contain near-identical code blocks (get effective pair, set input values, reset suppressModal/wasUserEdited flags). This duplicated pattern could be extracted into a shared helper. No convention exists in AGENTS.md or the skill about DRY patterns for the JS codebase.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: static/js/app.js lines 1098-1118 (chain change handler) duplicates logic in setDefaultPair() at lines ~1146-1160. Both call getEffectivePair(), set quoteFromInput/quoteToInput values, and reset suppressModal/wasUserEdited on both autocomplete instances.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation screenshots (val-*.png) accumulate in the repo root without cleanup guidance. There are 20+ screenshot files in the repo root. No .gitignore rule or AGENTS.md guidance exists for managing these artifacts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Repo root contains val-cross-quote-flows.png, val-dryrun-*.png, val-list-*.png, val-quote-form-*.png, val-regression-*.png, val-static-*.png, ui-*.png — all binary files tracked in git.

summary: Pass. The fix correctly addresses the chain switch bug where From/To tokens were not updated when switching to a chain with a saved custom pair. The change is minimal (removing an incorrect conditional guard), logically sound, and thoroughly verified against all 6 cross-area assertions via browser automation. No blocking issues found. Two non-blocking observations: duplicated token-update logic and accumulating screenshot artifacts in repo root.
